nodes.title: Research
nodes.note: Survey done in-conversation, then written up via /plan-1a (arg: 'for posterity'). Native fs.watch is inotify-backed and silently dead on drvfs/9P mounts; usePolling declared but unwired; clean per-worktree factory seam; SOURCE_WATCHER_IGNORED reusable.

nodes.title: Spec (Simple, CS-3)
nodes.note: Simple mode. Round 1: Simple / Lightweight / avoid-mocks / README+env-example. No Round 2 (no NEW domains, harness exists, no critical clarifications). Scope locked: env-forced only, no auto-detection, no adaptive interval.
nodes.user_input: Simplest version of this where we just force it on with env otherwise its not detected etc. This is super edge case, i rarely use in this modality

nodes.title: Workshop: PollingFileWatcherAdapter design
nodes.note: Implementation-Ready design: snapshot (size,mtime) diff -> add/change/unlink/addDir parity with native; ignore-list prune-before-descend; skip-if-busy scan guard; selecting FileWatcherFactory reads env; no unlinkDir (native parity). Authoritative for /plan-3.

nodes.title: Plan (Simple, READY, validated)
nodes.note: Simple-mode plan, all 7 gates PASS -> READY. validate-v2 (narrow, 2 agents) VALIDATED WITH FIXES: source-verified di-container.ts:593-595 / interface usePolling / compileIgnorePatterns:222-231 / unlink-no-unlinkDir parity; applied 5 fixes (T001 extraction source, flat unit-test path, export FileWatcherFactory, consumer-verification in T006, AC1 pinned to features/060 test).

nodes.title: Implementation (single phase, T001-T006 + FX)
nodes.user_input: use compaion /6 command to implement please
nodes.note: Companion build complete. T001 extract ignore helper; T002 PollingFileWatcherAdapter; T003 selecting FileWatcherFactory + barrel; T004 DI swap; T005 env docs; T006 unit(15)+integration(5)+consumer-ripple. Companion (reviewed T001-T005) flagged T004 HIGH (root barrel export gap — independently caught + fixed) and T002 MEDIUM (unwatch-during-pending-baseline — fixed via 'watched' set + regression test). Gate: tsc 0 errors, biome clean, 41 watcher tests green.

agents.note: Reviewed T001-T005 then self-terminated on idle budget (run completed). 2 findings, both resolved: T004 HIGH (barrel export), T002 MEDIUM (unwatch lifecycle). T006+FX not companion-reviewed (test/tsc/biome-validated instead). Supersedes /plan-7 for the reviewed commits.
